nasb.text: Now as to the times and the epochs, brethren, you have no need of anything to be written to you.

esv.text: Now concerning the times and the seasons, brothers,  you have no need to have anything written to you.

cnv.text: 弟兄們，論到時候和日期，不用寫甚麼給你們了。

ccb.text: 弟兄姊妹，这件事会在什么日期、什么时候发生，不必我写信告诉你们，

csbs.text: 弟兄们，关于这些时候和日期，你们不需要我写什么给你们了。
